title: Fable下线令Claude Code"toast"锐减
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "A plus of Fable being down is the number of times the word “toast” appears in Claude Code has dropped dramatically.
That model loved/loves software development and UX jargon more than any other model I have used." / X
